must_have_breakdown.evidence: Resume lists Git and GitHub usage across multiple engagements, but only in the context of Salesforce DX and Copado pipelines, not Python projects.
Candidate references REST and SOAP API integration within Salesforce LWC context, not Python-based API development.

reasoning: Reject — wrong domain entirely. This candidate is a Senior Salesforce Platform Manager with 6+ years of Salesforce-specific experience (Apex, LWC, Copado, Salesforce DX) — they have zero evidence of Python development, Django/Flask/FastAPI, Python-based databases, Docker, Jenkins, or AI/ML model training, all of which are core requirements for this Junior Python Developer role. The single partial credits for Git and REST APIs are Salesforce-context only and do not transfer. The recruiter's additional requirement for Python projects and AI model training makes this an even harder miss — nothing in this resume touches either. Do not shortlist. Redirect this candidate to Salesforce-focused roles at the Senior or Lead level instead.
strengths: SALESFORCE CI/CD MASTERY: Managed 50+ end-to-end Salesforce releases at HSBC using Copado across 5 environments with zero unplanned production outages over 18 months — but this is entirely irrelevant to the Python Developer role.

ENTERPRISE DELIVERY SCALE: Oversaw 20+ concurrent development streams at CVS Health and reduced production defect escape rate by 30% and deployment time by 25% — strong DevOps pedigree, wrong technology stack.

GOVERNANCE AND COMPLIANCE DEPTH: Established CoE frameworks and release governance SOPs adopted as NTT Data standards across engagements — senior-level impact, but zero applicability to a Junior Python back-end role.
gaps: NO PYTHON OR BACK-END DEVELOPMENT EXPERIENCE: The candidate has no evidence of Python (3.x), Django, Flask, FastAPI, PyTest, or any Python-adjacent technology anywhere in their resume — this is the foundational requirement for the role and it is completely absent.

NO AI/ML MODEL TRAINING: The recruiter explicitly requires Python projects with AI model training experience; this candidate has no machine learning, data science, or AI tooling mentioned anywhere — a total mismatch with the hiring intent.

scoring_factors.reason: No notice period specified in the resume and JD has no stated maximum — no penalty applied.
JD requires In-office in Bangalore; candidate is based in Hyderabad, India — location mismatch.
JD requires 0 relevant experience so no minimum threshold to breach — no penalty applied.
JD gender preference is Any — no penalty applied.
No college preference or exclusion specified in the JD — no penalty applied.

availability_reason: Latest role end-date is listed as March 2026 — candidate appears to be between engagements currently.
alternative_role_fit: Senior Salesforce Platform Manager / Salesforce DevOps Lead
rare_assets: Copado expert-level CI/CD orchestration with 50+ managed Salesforce releases and zero production outages at HSBC — highly rare at this depth.
Salesforce Premier Support escalation experience at HSBC for a global banking CRM — very few practitioners operate at this level.
Federated development architecture across multi-region parallel teams with zero metadata collision incidents — niche enterprise Salesforce governance capability.
self_reported_unverified: Claim of 'zero unplanned production outages over 18 months' at HSBC — a strong claim with no independent audit reference or third-party validation cited.
CoE framework 'adopted as the standard across NTT Data Salesforce engagements' — scope and formal adoption process are unverifiable from the resume alone.
'Reducing team escalations by 50% within 3 months' — impactful metric but no baseline data or measurement methodology provided.
interview_flags: Candidate has a B.Com degree from Osmania University — probe how they transitioned into a technical Salesforce platform role and what foundational technical training they underwent.
Six-year tenure at NTT Data in a single employer context — probe whether the multi-client experience reflects genuine independent delivery or managed account work with heavy senior oversight.
Resume claims Expert-level Copado proficiency but only holds Copado Fundamentals I certification — probe why no advanced Copado certification has been pursued despite years of claimed expert use.
All REST/SOAP API experience is Salesforce-context only — probe if there is any general web API development experience outside the Salesforce platform.
Recruiter requires Python and AI model training — directly ask if candidate has any personal projects, coursework, or side work involving Python or ML, even if not on the resume.
